summary: Rewrite `recommendations stale` for the real nested /recommendations shape (category groups -> items with name + Quest-code Biomarkers); join targets to results by Quest code; add --group and --limit; repurpose --min-rounds as out-of-optimal persistence (the endpoint has no issued-date).
reason: The generated command assumed flat recs with id/title/body/biomarkerId/createdAt — none of which exist. The live payload is dietary/supplement guidance tagged with Quest codes and no timestamp, so age-based staleness is impossible; outcome-based (target still out-of-optimal) is the honest signal. This is retro 'recommendations stale field-mismatch'.
validated_outcome: Live: joins all 10 distinct rec Quest codes to biomarkers; --group supplements and --min-rounds N filter correctly; QuestCode field added to resultRow for the join.
